'''havojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanography|cyanography]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanography|cyanography]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| havojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hævejeth|hævejeth]] || [[word:hævejej|hævejej]] || [[word:hævejesh|hævejesh]] || [[word:hæveje|hæveje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:havovojoth|havovojoth]] || [[word:havovojoj|havovojoj]] || [[word:havovojosh|havovojosh]] || [[word:havovojo|havovojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:havojoth|havojoth]] || [[word:havojoj|havojoj]] || [[word:havojosh|havojosh]] || [[word:havojo|havojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:havofjoth|havofjoth]] || [[word:havofjoj|havofjoj]] || [[word:havofjosh|havofjosh]] || [[word:havofjof|havofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:havojotho|havojotho]] || [[word:havojojo|havojojo]] || [[word:havojosho|havojosho]] || [[word:havojoko|havojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:havojoth|havojoth]] || [[word:havojoj|havojoj]] || [[word:havojosh|havojosh]] || [[word:havojo|havojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:havojothol|havojothol]] || [[word:havojojol|havojojol]] || [[word:havojoshol|havojoshol]] || [[word:havojokol|havojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:havojothotho|havojothotho]] || [[word:havojojojo|havojojojo]] || [[word:havojoshosho|havojoshosho]] || [[word:havojoko|havojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:havojothon|havojothon]] || [[word:havojojon|havojojon]] || [[word:havojoshon|havojoshon]] || [[word:havojokon|havojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:havojothoro|havojothoro]] || [[word:havojojoro|havojojoro]] || [[word:havojoshoro|havojoshoro]] || [[word:havojokoro|havojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
